resources.string: Forwards touch events from the SBS stereo overlay to the projected app at the correct screen coordinates.

1. Tap "Start SBS"
 2. Grant screen capture permission when prompted
 3. Switch to the app you want to project
 4. Put your phone in the VR headset

 To stop: tap the red STOP button at the top of the overlay,
or pull down the notification and tap "Stop SBS".
